name: Sesame Broccoli & Cauliflower Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/4 tsp Chili oil or Cayenne pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook broccoli and cauliflower separately in boiling water until crisp-tender, about 10 minutes. Rinse under cold water to stop the cooking; drain well.
2. Refrigerate the cooked vegetables.
3. Mix green onions, soy sauce, toasted sesame seeds, sesame oil, honey, chili oil or Cayenne pepper, and salt. Taste and adjust seasonings as needed.
4. Toss the prepared dressing with the broccoli and cauliflower.
5. Serve on lettuce leaves. Garnish with tomato wedges.
